### Post by RavonTUS on 2007-02-28
Greetings,

I am a recent ubuntu convert and need a little help figuring out How to Open Port 2593.

I think I need to configure "iptables" from my searching for information.  I used the following commands and this is what I get...

Command:
```

sudo iptables -A OUTPUT -p tcp --dport 2593 -j ACCEPT
sudo iptables -A OUTPUT -p tcp --dport 2593 -j ACCEPT
sudo iptables-save

# Generated by iptables-save v1.3.5 on Wed Feb 28 08:11:59 2007
*filter
:INPUT ACCEPT [28515:12228711]
:FORWARD ACCEPT [0:0]
:OUTPUT ACCEPT [23543:1681323]
-A INPUT -p tcp -m tcp --dport 2593 -j ACCEPT
-A OUTPUT -p tcp -m tcp --dport 2593 -j ACCEPT
COMMIT
# Completed on Wed Feb 28 08:11:59 2007
# Generated by iptables-save v1.3.5 on Wed Feb 28 08:11:59 2007
*nat
:PREROUTING ACCEPT [815:164963]
:POSTROUTING ACCEPT [11919:715210]
:OUTPUT ACCEPT [11919:715210]
-A PREROUTING -i ppp0 -p tcp -m tcp --dport 2593 -j DNAT --to-destination 127.0.0.1
-A POSTROUTING -o eth0 -p tcp -m tcp --dport 4661 -j SNAT --to-source 127.0.0.1
-A POSTROUTING -o eth0 -p tcp -m tcp --dport 2593 -j SNAT --to-source 127.0.0.1
COMMIT
# Completed on Wed Feb 28 08:11:59 2007

```


**Response:**
```

sudo iptables --list
Chain INPUT (policy ACCEPT)
target     prot opt source               destination
ACCEPT     tcp  --  anywhere             anywhere            tcp dpt:2593

Chain FORWARD (policy ACCEPT)
target     prot opt source               destination

Chain OUTPUT (policy ACCEPT)
target     prot opt source               destination
ACCEPT     tcp  --  anywhere             anywhere            tcp dpt:2593

```

However, if I start my application and then in another konsole screen run "nmap", it appears that the port is not really open.  Neither can I connect from another computer.

```

nmap 127.0.0.1

Starting Nmap 4.10 ( http://www.insecure.org/nmap/ ) at 2007-02-28 08:14 EST
Interesting ports on localhost (127.0.0.1):
Not shown: 1678 closed ports
PORT    STATE SERVICE
631/tcp open  ipp

Nmap finished: 1 IP address (1 host up) scanned in 0.170 seconds

```

What am I doing wrong?  What do I need to do to open/enable this port?

-Ravon
